customManagers.description: Dependency versions purrfold pins into generated apps. Single source of truth: src/versions.json (see src/installers/config-model.ts for the pinning rationale). The CLI's own dependencies and GitHub Actions stay with Dependabot.

packageRules.description: Group non-major pin bumps into one weekly PR; the full E2E matrix in .github/workflows/e2e.yml validates it before merge.
eslint stays on v9 until eslint-plugin-react ships v10 support (v10 removed context.getFilename(), still used transitively via eslint-config-next).
@vitejs/plugin-react v6 is a known-bad line for generated Next apps (original bug report: pulled vite@7 into the unit-test toolchain).
eslint-plugin-astro v2 peer-requires eslint >= 10, incompatible with the eslint v9 pin above. Unblock together with the eslint major (E2E caught this: npm ERESOLVE on Astro scenarios, PR #12).

prBodyNotes: This PR changes what purrfold installs into **generated apps** (`src/versions.json`). Before merging: the full E2E matrix (`E2E` workflow) must be green. After merging: add a changeset (`npm run changeset`) so the bump ships in the next release.
